entities.name: CROP SIMULATION MODELS
entities.description: Models used for assisting in agrotechnology transfer, crop management decision-making, and climatic assessment

entities.name: AGROTECHNOLOGY TRANSFER
entities.description: The process of transferring agricultural technology to users

entities.name: CROP MANAGEMENT DECISION-MAKING
entities.description: The process of making informed decisions regarding crop management

entities.name: CLIMATIC ASSESSMENT
entities.description: The evaluation of climatic factors and their impact

entities.name: GROWTH
entities.description: The increase in size or development of a crop

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of agricultural production per unit area

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The agricultural crop being modeled, also known as Arachis hypogaea

entities.name: ARACHIS HYPOGAEA
entities.description: The scientific name for groundnut

entities.name: PNUTGRO
entities.description: A specific crop growth model developed for groundnut

entities.name: FLORIDA
entities.description: A location from which data sets were obtained for model evaluation

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A location from which data sets were obtained for model evaluation

entities.name: HEDGEROW PHOTOSYNTHESIS SUBMODEL
entities.description: A submodel added to PNUTGRO to improve response to row spacing, sowing density, and growth habit

entities.name: ROW SPACING
entities.description: The distance between rows of crops

entities.name: SOWING DENSITY
entities.description: The number of seeds sown per unit area

entities.name: GROWTH HABIT
entities.description: The characteristic form or manner of growth of a plant

entities.name: PEN MAN EQUATION
entities.description: An equation used to incorporate vapor pressure deficit and windspeed to estimate evapotranspiration

entities.name: VAPOR PRESSURE DEFICIT
entities.description: The difference between the amount of moisture in the air and how much moisture the air can hold when saturated

entities.name: WINDSPEED
entities.description: The speed of the wind

entities.name: EVAPOTRANSPIRATION
entities.description: The process of water transfer from land to atmosphere via evaporation and transpiration

entities.name: ARID REGIONS
entities.description: Regions characterized by a severe lack of available water

entities.name: CROP DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The progression of a crop through its growth stages

entities.name: STRESS ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Environmental conditions that negatively impact crop growth and partitioning

entities.name: HIGH TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Temperature levels that cause stress to the crop

entities.name: PARTITIONING
entities.description: The distribution of biomass among different plant organs
